name: Scorched earth
description:
*-Year 2573. Centuries ago wore broke out, and that war ended along with the Earth...Not literally, of course, the planet was still there. Just vastly different than it had been. Nukes were fired along with most missiles and bombs the world’s militaries had to offer when the war was still going on. But all that left the remnants of humanity with was an eternal summer, society splintered and in shambles and animals and any miraculously living plant life drastically altered and mutated.-*

I was gonna do a set scenario (as in first message to establish who you are, where you are etc etc.) but since I feel like it’ll be enjoyable for people to choose those things themselves I’m gonna leave it as a ‘come up with your own story’ sort of thing.

I’m not the most creative person in the world, so, sorry if what’s in the description sounds like a load of bullshit. Also as I’m making this and about to officially finish making it, I feel like I’m forgetting to add something so there might be more things added later.

Pretty basic premise, yeah, but whatever. Thought it’d be fun making a sort of apocalyptic roleplay bot. If you like it, you like it, if you don’t, you don’t. Leave a review if there’s anything wrong with the bot, or if you just like the bot. Public chats are welcome too, I like reading
creator: Conneisour of men
